title: CBT thought record

steps.title: Situation
steps.body: Write the situation in one or two factual sentences.

steps.title: Emotion rating
steps.body: Rate the emotion intensity from 1 to 10.

steps.title: Evidence check
steps.body: Name evidence for and against the thought.

steps.title: Balanced thought
steps.body: Write a more balanced thought that does not dismiss the hard parts.

steps.title: Small next action
steps.body: Choose one next action that fits the balanced thought.

completionPrompt: Notice whether the emotion intensity changed, even slightly.
